address: 59 Goldspink Lane, Newcastle City Centre NE2 1NQ
lead_profile_text: Existing 2-bed furnished flat, owned outright, currently vacant. Found Stayful via Google search. High-intent lead. Needs property upgrades (smart TV, kitchen, bathroom amenities) before listing. NE2 is a strong Stayful market.
emotional_profile: Analytical and methodical. Low-friction profile — no mortgage, no occupier. Primary gate is upgrade cost research. Responsive to concrete numbers and case studies.
delay_trigger_phrases: wants to research upgrade costs before deciding
green_light_trigger_phrases: high-intent Google search — vacant, no mortgage, furnished

top_objections.text: Wants to research upgrade costs before deciding
top_objections.zac_response: Upgrade checklist to be sent by Zac — smart TV, kitchen, bathroom amenities

top_objections.text: Performance expectations — initial Year 1 ramp period
top_objections.zac_response: Year 1 projected 20% lower during ramp; Year 2 full projections apply; Manchester case study outperformed

top_objections.text: Upgrade requirements for Airbnb standard not yet costed
top_objections.zac_response: Specific checklist items provided; upgrade is one-time investment with fast payback at £1,940/month net

top_questions.text: What upgrades does the property need?
top_questions.answer: Smart TV, kitchen amenities, bathroom amenities — checklist to be sent by Zac

top_questions.text: How many reviews are needed for full income projections?
top_questions.answer: 70-90 reviews at 4.5-4.8 rating — Year 1 projected 20% lower during ramp period

top_questions.text: What are the monthly utilities costs?

what_moved_them: Manchester case study — 35k net vs 32k projected (outperformed forecast by ~10%)
Full end-to-end service — nothing to manage
what_fell_flat: Upgrade cost unknown — no figure given in meeting; creates research pause

conversion_gaps.gap: Upgrade cost unknown — primary blocking decision
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Send itemised upgrade checklist with estimated costs immediately; removes the main gate
Follow up in ~1 week well before June 23 expiry; checklist delivery is the trigger

offer_framing: 13% + VAT vs standard 15% — limited window expiring 23 June; checklist delivery accelerates the decision
zac_close_phrase: I'll send the upgrade checklist — once you have the costs you'll have everything you need to decide
zac_income_intro: £1,940/month net — 12 comparable properties in Newcastle, £167/night, 72% occupancy. NE2 is one of our strongest markets.
zac_transition_phrases: NE2 is an exceptionally strong market — we had a Manchester comparison that outperformed by 10%
The upgrade is a one-time investment; at £1,940/month net the payback is fast
zac_reassurance_phrases: Full end-to-end — you hand over the keys, we handle everything
£300 maintenance threshold — above that we check with you first
zac_analogies: Manchester case study: 35k net vs 32k projected — properties in strong markets routinely outperform forecast
